description: Elixium AI — Agile project management for AI-native development teams.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.IndirectTek/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Your Elixium API key from Command Center > Settings > API Keys
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your Elixium workspace API URL (e.g., https://your-team.elixium.ai/api)
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Board slug to scope operations to a specific board (optional, auto-detects if only one board)
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_BOARD_SLUG

environmentVariables.description: Email of the user creating stories (optional, defaults to API key owner)
environmentVariables.name: ELIXIUM_USER_EMAIL
